title: Thoughts from Our Advisory
subtitle: Weekly perspectives on aviation assets, transactions, and market intelligence from the Bridgeway team.

posts.headline: Narrowbody Demand Signals: What Lessors Are Watching in Q1
posts.excerpt: With delivery backlogs extending into 2028, secondary market values for current-generation narrowbodies continue to firm. Here's what we're tracking across the transaction landscape and where we see the smartest capital being deployed.
posts.author: Brian R. Dillion
